name: niks-degoog-extensions
description: My plugins and themes for degoog search.
author: nikitakostin

plugins.name: Prowlarr
plugins.description: Search your Prowlarr indexers directly from degoog via !prowlarr. Requires a running Prowlarr instance and API key.

plugins.name: Shortcuts
plugins.description: Configurable shortcut tiles on the degoog home page. Shortcuts are stored per-browser in localStorage and can be added, edited, or removed directly from the home page.
